MATCH (s:Station) RETURN s.name, s.id LIMIT 10
MATCH (t:Train {status: 'active'}) RETURN t.id, t.name, t.capacity
MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(tk:Ticket) WHERE tk.status = 'valid' RETURN p.name, tk.id, tk.price
MATCH (j:Journey)-[:USES]->(t:Train) RETURN j.id, t.name, j.departure_time ORDER BY j.departure_time DESC LIMIT 5
MATCH (r:Route)-[:CONTAINS]->(s:Station) RETURN r.id, collect(s.name) as stations, r.distance_km
MATCH (t:Train)-[:STOPS_AT]->(st:Station) WHERE st.name = 'Central Station' RETURN t.id, t.name, count(DISTINCT st) as stop_count
MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(tk:Ticket)-[:FOR]->(j:Journey) WHERE j.status = 'completed' RETURN p.id, count(tk) as tickets_purchased, sum(tk.price) as total_spent
MATCH (d:DailyPassengerLog)-[:RECORDED_FOR]->(st:Station) WHERE d.date = date('2024-03-15') RETURN st.name, d.passenger_count, d.peak_hour
MATCH (tc:TravelCard)-[:BELONGS_TO]->(p:Passenger) RETURN p.name, tc.card_id, tc.balance, tc.expiry_date ORDER BY tc.balance DESC
MATCH (sm:StaffMember)-[:WORKS_AT]->(d:Depot) RETURN d.name, count(sm) as staff_count, collect(sm.name) as staff_members
MATCH (i:Incident)-[:AFFECTED]->(r:Route), (r)-[:CONTAINS]->(s:Station) RETURN i.id, i.incident_type, r.id, collect(DISTINCT s.name) as affected_stations, i.duration_minutes
MATCH (t:Train)-[:STOPS_AT]->(s:Station), (s)<-[:CONTAINS]-(r:Route) WHERE t.status = 'active' RETURN t.id, r.id, count(DISTINCT s) as intermediate_stops, collect(DISTINCT s.name) as stations

MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(tk:Ticket)-[:FOR]->(j:Journey)-[:USES]->(t:Train) WHERE tk.purchase_date >= date('2024-01-01') AND t.capacity > 100 RETURN p.id, p.name, count(DISTINCT tk) as high_capacity_tickets, sum(tk.price) as revenue_from_large_trains
MATCH (ml:MaintenanceLog)-[:MAINTENANCE_FOR]->(t:Train) WHERE ml.status = 'pending' RETURN t.id, t.name, ml.maintenance_type, ml.scheduled_date, count(ml) as pending_tasks ORDER BY ml.scheduled_date

MATCH (j:Journey)-[:USES]->(t:Train), (j)-[:STOPS_AT]->(s:Station), (dpl:DailyPassengerLog)-[:RECORDED_FOR]->(s) WHERE j.status = 'scheduled' RETURN j.id, j.departure_time, s.name, dpl.passenger_count, (dpl.passenger_count * 0.75) as estimated_journey_occupancy

MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(tk:Ticket)-[:FOR]->(j:Journey)-[:AFFECTED_BY]->(i:Incident) WHERE i.incident_type IN ['delay', 'cancellation'] RETURN p.id, count(DISTINCT tk) as affected_tickets, count(DISTINCT i) as incident_count, collect(DISTINCT i.incident_type) as incident_types

MATCH (r1:Route)-[:CONTAINS]->(s:Station)<-[:CONTAINS]-(r2:Route) WHERE r1.id < r2.id RETURN r1.id, r2.id, s.name as shared_station, r1.distance_km + r2.distance_km as combined_distance ORDER BY combined_distance DESC

MATCH (tc:TravelCard)-[:BELONGS_TO]->(p:Passenger), (p)-[:PURCHASED]->(tk:Ticket)-[:FOR]->(j:Journey)-[:USES]->(t:Train) WHERE tc.balance > 0 AND j.departure_time > datetime() RETURN p.id, p.name, tc.balance, count(DISTINCT tk) as upcoming_tickets, avg(t.capacity) as avg_train_capacity, stDev(t.capacity) as capacity_variance

MATCH (s:Station)<-[:STOPS_AT]-(t:Train)-[:PART_OF_DEPOT]->(d:Depot), (sm:StaffMember)-[:WORKS_AT]->(d), (ml:MaintenanceLog)-[:MAINTENANCE_FOR]->(t) WHERE ml.status IN ['completed', 'pending'] AND s.station_type = 'major' RETURN s.name, d.name, count(DISTINCT t) as trains_at_station, count(DISTINCT sm) as available_staff, count(DISTINCT ml) as maintenance_records, count(DISTINCT CASE WHEN ml.status = 'pending' THEN ml END) as pending_maintenance

MATCH (p1:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(tk1:Ticket)-[:FOR]->(j:Journey)-[:USES]->(t:Train), (p2:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(tk2:Ticket)-[:FOR]->(j) WHERE p1.id < p2.id WITH j, t, count(DISTINCT p1) + count(DISTINCT p2) as co_travelers, sum(tk1.price) + sum(tk2.price) as revenue MATCH (dpl:DailyPassengerLog)-[:RECORDED_FOR]->(s:Station) WHERE j.departure_date = dpl.date WITH j, t, co_travelers, revenue, collect({station: s.name, capacity: dpl.passenger_count}) as capacity_logs RETURN j.id, j.departure_time, t.id, co_travelers, revenue, [c IN capacity_logs | c.capacity] as station_capacities, reduce(total=0, c IN capacity_logs | total + c.capacity) as total_network_load ORDER BY total_network_load DESC LIMIT 10
MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(tk:Ticket) RETURN p.id, count(tk) as total_tickets ORDER BY total_tickets DESC LIMIT 10
MATCH (s:Station)-[:SERVES]->(r:Route), (r)<-[:PART_OF]-(j:Journey) RETURN s.name, r.id, count(j) as daily_journeys
MATCH (t:Train)-[:STOPS_AT]->(s:Station) RETURN t.id, count(s) as stops_count, collect(s.name) as station_names
MATCH (ml:MaintenanceLog) WHERE ml.status = 'in_progress' RETURN ml.id, ml.maintenance_type, ml.estimated_completion
MATCH (dpl:DailyPassengerLog) WHERE dpl.date = date('2024-03-20') RETURN sum(dpl.passenger_count) as total_daily_passengers
MATCH (tk:Ticket)-[:FOR]->(j:Journey) WHERE j.departure_time > datetime('2024-03-25T00:00:00') RETURN j.id, count(tk) as ticket_sales
MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(tk:Ticket)-[:FOR]->(j:Journey) WHERE tk.price > 50 RETURN p.id, p.name, count(tk) as high_value_tickets
MATCH (r:Route)-[:CONTAINS]->(s:Station) RETURN r.id, r.name, count(s) as station_count ORDER BY station_count DESC
MATCH (t:Train)-[:OPERATED_BY]->(d:Depot) RETURN d.name, count(t) as trains_operated
MATCH (sm:StaffMember)-[:ASSIGNED_TO]->(t:Train) WHERE sm.status = 'active' RETURN t.id, count(sm) as crew_size
MATCH (j:Journey)-[:STOPS_AT]->(s:Station) WHERE j.status = 'delayed' RETURN j.id, count(s) as scheduled_stops, j.delay_minutes
MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(tk:Ticket), (tc:TravelCard)-[:BELONGS_TO]->(p) RETURN p.id, count(DISTINCT tk) as tickets, tc.balance
MATCH (i:Incident)-[:AFFECTED]->(j:Journey) WHERE i.incident_type = 'mechanical_failure' RETURN count(DISTINCT j) as affected_journeys
MATCH (s:Station) WHERE s.accessibility_rating > 4.0 RETURN s.name, s.accessibility_rating, s.platform_count
MATCH (r:Route)-[:CONTAINS]->(s:Station) WHERE s.station_type = 'major' RETURN r.id, count(s) as major_stations
MATCH (t:Train)-[:STOPS_AT]->(s1:Station)-[:CONNECTED_TO]->(s2:Station) RETURN t.id, s1.name, s2.name, count(DISTINCT t) as trains_using_connection
MATCH (p:Passenger)-[PURCHASED:PURCHASED]->(tk:Ticket) WHERE datetime(tk.purchase_date) > datetime() - duration('P30D') RETURN p.id, count(tk) as recent_purchases
MATCH (j:Journey)-[:USES]->(t:Train), (j)-[:STOPS_AT]->(s:Station) WHERE t.capacity > 150 RETURN j.id, t.id, count(s) as stops, t.capacity
MATCH (d:DailyPassengerLog)-[:RECORDED_FOR]->(s:Station) RETURN s.name, avg(d.passenger_count) as avg_daily_passengers, max(d.passenger_count) as peak_passengers
MATCH (tk:Ticket)-[:FOR]->(j:Journey), (j)-[:USES]->(t:Train) WHERE tk.status = 'valid' RETURN t.id, count(tk) as valid_tickets, sum(tk.price) as revenue
MATCH (r:Route)-[:CONTAINS]->(s:Station)<-[:STOPS_AT]-(t:Train) RETURN r.id, count(DISTINCT t) as trains_on_route, collect(DISTINCT t.id) as train_ids
MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(tk:Ticket)-[:FOR]->(j:Journey)-[:USES]->(t:Train) WHERE t.train_type = 'express' RETURN p.id, count(DISTINCT t) as express_trips

MATCH (sm:StaffMember)-[:WORKS_AT]->(d:Depot), (ml:MaintenanceLog)-[:MAINTENANCE_FOR]->(t:Train)-[:OPERATED_BY]->(d) RETURN d.name, count(DISTINCT sm) as staff, count(DISTINCT ml) as maintenance_tasks
MATCH (j:Journey)-[:STOPS_AT]->(s:Station) WHERE j.departure_date = date('2024-03-25') RETURN s.name, count(DISTINCT j) as journeys_through_station
MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(tk:Ticket) WHERE tk.ticket_type = 'return' RETURN count(DISTINCT p) as passengers_with_returns, count(tk) as total_return_tickets
MATCH (t:Train)-[:STOPS_AT]->(s:Station) RETURN s.name, count(DISTINCT t) as train_count, t.train_type
MATCH (r:Route)-[:CONTAINS]->(s:Station) WHERE s.wheelchair_accessible = true RETURN r.id, count(s) as accessible_stations
MATCH (i:Incident)-[:AFFECTED]->(r:Route) WHERE datetime(i.timestamp) > datetime() - duration('P7D') RETURN r.id, count(i) as incidents_last_week
MATCH (tc:TravelCard)-[:BELONGS_TO]->(p:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(tk:Ticket) WHERE tc.status = 'active' RETURN p.id, tc.balance, count(tk) as pending_tickets
MATCH (j:Journey)-[:USES]->(t:Train) WHERE j.occupancy_rate > 0.8 RETURN j.id, j.occupancy_rate, t.capacity, t.id
MATCH (d:DailyPassengerLog)-[:RECORDED_FOR]->(s:Station) WHERE d.peak_hour = 18 RETURN s.name, avg(d.passenger_count) as evening_avg, max(d.passenger_count) as evening_max
MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(tk:Ticket)-[:FOR]->(j:Journey) WHERE tk.refund_status = 'pending' RETURN p.id, count(tk) as pending_refunds, sum(tk.price) as refund_amount
MATCH (t:Train)-[:STOPS_AT]->(s:Station), (ml:MaintenanceLog)-[:MAINTENANCE_FOR]->(t) RETURN t.id, s.name, count(ml) as maintenance_records, ml.status
MATCH (r:Route)-[:CONTAINS]->(s:Station)-[:RECORDED_FOR]-(dpl:DailyPassengerLog) WHERE dpl.date >= date('2024-03-01') RETURN r.id, s.name, sum(dpl.passenger_count) as total_passengers
MATCH (p:Passenger) WHERE p.age_group = '25-35' RETURN count(p) as young_adult_passengers, avg(p.ticket_count) as avg_tickets_purchased
MATCH (t:Train)-[:OPERATED_BY]->(d:Depot), (j:Journey)-[:USES]->(t) WHERE j.status = 'completed' RETURN d.name, count(j) as completed_journeys, collect(DISTINCT t.id) as active_trains
MATCH (sm:StaffMember) WHERE sm.employment_status = 'full_time' RETURN sm.role, count(sm) as role_count
MATCH (i:Incident)-[:AFFECTED]->(j:Journey)-[:USES]->(t:Train) RETURN t.id, count(DISTINCT i) as incident_count, count(DISTINCT j) as affected_journeys
MATCH (tk:Ticket)-[:FOR]->(j:Journey)-[:STOPS_AT]->(s:Station) RETURN s.name, count(DISTINCT tk) as ticket_volume, count(DISTINCT j) as journey_count

MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(tk:Ticket)-[:FOR]->(j:Journey)-[:USES]->(t:Train)-[:STOPS_AT]->(s:Station) WHERE j.departure_date = date('2024-03-25') RETURN j.id, count(DISTINCT s) as stations_visited, count(DISTINCT tk) as ticket_count, sum(tk.price) as journey_revenue
MATCH (d:Depot) RETURN d.id, d.name, d.capacity, d.location
MATCH (sm:StaffMember) WHERE sm.department = 'operations' RETURN count(sm) as ops_staff, collect(sm.name) as staff_names LIMIT 1
MATCH (i:Incident) WHERE i.resolved = false RETURN i.id, i.incident_type, i.timestamp, i.severity
MATCH (tc:TravelCard) WHERE tc.card_type = 'monthly' RETURN count(tc) as monthly_cards, avg(tc.balance) as avg_balance
MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(tk:Ticket) WHERE p.country = 'Sweden' RETURN count(DISTINCT p) as swedish_passengers, count(tk) as tickets_sold
MATCH (s:Station)-[:SERVED_BY]->(r:Route) RETURN s.name, count(r) as routes_serving_station ORDER BY routes_serving_station DESC
MATCH (t:Train)-[:STOPS_AT]->(s:Station) WHERE t.electric = true RETURN count(DISTINCT t) as electric_trains, count(DISTINCT s) as stations_served
MATCH (ml:MaintenanceLog) WHERE ml.cost > 5000 RETURN ml.id, ml.maintenance_type, ml.cost, ml.train_id ORDER BY ml.cost DESC
MATCH (dpl:DailyPassengerLog) WHERE dpl.date >= date('2024-03-01') AND dpl.date <= date('2024-03-31') RETURN sum(dpl.passenger_count) as march_total, avg(dpl.passenger_count) as march_avg
MATCH (j:Journey)-[:USES]->(t:Train) WHERE j.departure_time >= time('06:00:00') AND j.departure_time < time('09:00:00') RETURN count(j) as morning_peak_journeys
MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(tk:Ticket)-[:FOR]->(j:Journey) WHERE p.age_group < '40' RETURN count(DISTINCT p) as younger_passengers, sum(tk.price) as youth_revenue
MATCH (r:Route)-[:CONTAINS]->(s:Station) WHERE r.operator = 'SJ' RETURN r.id, r.name, count(s) as stops
MATCH (i:Incident)-[:AFFECTED]->(j:Journey) WHERE i.duration_minutes > 30 RETURN count(DISTINCT j) as journeys_delayed_over_30_min
MATCH (tk:Ticket) WHERE tk.booking_method = 'mobile_app' RETURN count(tk) as app_bookings, sum(tk.price) as app_revenue
MATCH (t:Train)-[:OPERATED_BY]->(d:Depot), (d)-[:LOCATED_IN]->(region) RETURN region, count(DISTINCT t) as trains_per_region
MATCH (s:Station) WHERE s.platform_count >= 5 RETURN s.name, s.platform_count, s.daily_arrivals ORDER BY s.daily_arrivals DESC
MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(tk:Ticket) WHERE tk.payment_method = 'credit_card' RETURN count(DISTINCT p) as card_payers, count(tk) as card_transactions
MATCH (j:Journey)-[:STOPS_AT]->(s:Station) RETURN j.id, j.route_id, count(s) as scheduled_stops, j.estimated_duration
MATCH (sm:StaffMember) WHERE sm.certification_expiry >= date() RETURN sm.role, count(sm) as certified_staff
MATCH (r:Route)-[:CONTAINS]->(s1:Station), (r)-[:CONTAINS]->(s2:Station) WHERE s1.name = 'Central' AND s1 <> s2 RETURN s2.name, r.id
MATCH (tc:TravelCard)-[:BELONGS_TO]->(p:Passenger) WHERE tc.last_used >= date() - duration('P7D') RETURN count(DISTINCT tc) as active_cards

MATCH (t:Train)-[:STOPS_AT]->(s:Station), (dpl:DailyPassengerLog)-[:RECORDED_FOR]->(s) WHERE dpl.date = date('2024-03-25') RETURN t.id, count(DISTINCT s) as stops_on_busy_day, avg(dpl.passenger_count) as avg_station_load
MATCH (i:Incident) WHERE i.incident_type IN ['weather', 'signal_failure', 'track_maintenance'] RETURN i.incident_type, count(i) as count_by_type
MATCH (j:Journey)-[:USES]->(t:Train)-[:STOPS_AT]->(s:Station) WHERE t.capacity > 200 RETURN j.id, t.id, count(s) as stops, t.capacity, j.revenue
MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(tk:Ticket), (tk)-[:FOR]->(j:Journey) WHERE tk.purchase_date < date('2024-01-01') AND j.status = 'unused' RETURN count(DISTINCT p) as expired_unused_passengers
MATCH (d:Depot)-[:HOUSES]->(t:Train), (t)-[:STOPS_AT]->(s:Station) RETURN d.name, count(DISTINCT t) as depot_trains, count(DISTINCT s) as network_reach
MATCH (ml:MaintenanceLog)-[:MAINTENANCE_FOR]->(t:Train) WHERE ml.status = 'completed' AND ml.completion_date >= date('2024-03-01') RETURN t.id, count(ml) as completed_maintenance
MATCH (s:Station) WHERE s.WiFi_available = true RETURN count(s) as wifi_enabled_stations, collect(s.name) as station_list LIMIT 1
MATCH (j:Journey)-[:AFFECTED_BY]->(i:Incident) WHERE i.severity = 'critical' RETURN count(j) as critically_affected_journeys, avg(i.duration_minutes) as avg_incident_duration
MATCH (tk:Ticket)-[:FOR]->(j:Journey)-[:USES]->(t:Train) WHERE j.day_of_week = 'weekend' RETURN count(tk) as weekend_tickets, sum(tk.price) as weekend_revenue
MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(tk1:Ticket), (p)-[:PURCHASED]->(tk2:Ticket) WHERE tk1 <> tk2 AND tk1.date = tk2.date RETURN p.id, count(DISTINCT tk1) as same_day_purchases
MATCH (r:Route)-[:CONTAINS]->(s:Station)<-[:STOPS_AT]-(t:Train) WHERE r.distance_km > 100 RETURN r.id, r.distance_km, count(DISTINCT t) as long_route_trains
MATCH (sm:StaffMember)-[:ASSIGNED_TO]->(t:Train), (t)-[:OPERATED_BY]->(d:Depot) RETURN d.name, count(DISTINCT sm) as crew_members, count(DISTINCT t) as trains_staffed
MATCH (dpl:DailyPassengerLog)-[:RECORDED_FOR]->(s:Station) WHERE dpl.date >= date('2024-03-01') RETURN s.name, max(dpl.passenger_count) as record_passengers, dpl.date
MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(tk:Ticket)-[:FOR]->(j:Journey), (j)-[:AFFECTED_BY]->(i:Incident) RETURN count(DISTINCT p) as affected_passengers, count(DISTINCT i) as incidents_encountered
MATCH (t:Train) WHERE t.last_inspection < date() - duration('P180D') RETURN count(t) as overdue_inspections, collect(t.id) as train_ids
MATCH (s:Station), (r:Route)-[:CONTAINS]->(s) RETURN s.name, count(DISTINCT r) as routes, count(DISTINCT s) as station_appearances

MATCH (j:Journey)-[:USES]->(t:Train) WHERE j.actual_departure > j.scheduled_departure RETURN count(j) as late_departures, avg(duration.between(j.scheduled_departure, j.actual_departure).minutes) as avg_delay_minutes
MATCH (tc:TravelCard)-[:BELONGS_TO]->(p:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(tk:Ticket) WHERE tc.balance < 10 RETURN p.id, tc.balance, count(tk) as unused_tickets, sum(tk.price) as unused_value
MATCH (i:Incident)-[:AFFECTED]->(r:Route) RETURN r.id, r.name, count(i) as total_incidents, collect(DISTINCT i.incident_type) as incident_types
